title: rule-categories-foundation
description:
Implement foundational types and pipeline changes for dual-category rules from docs/plans/06-rule-categories.md.

Sections: §4.1, §4.2, §4.3, §4.4, §4.5, §4.6, §4.7, §4.11

Key deliverables:
- RuleCategory bitmask type (CategoryDestructive, CategoryPrivacy, CategoryBoth) in internal/evalcore
- PolicyConfig struct with Decide() method implementing deny>ask>allow merge
- Updated Match struct with Category field
- Updated Result struct replacing Assessment with DestructiveAssessment/PrivacyAssessment
- Pack.Destructive renamed to Pack.Rules (update all callers: pipeline.go, registry.go, guard.go, pack definitions)
- Rule.Category field added to internal/packs Rule struct
- aggregateByCategory function in internal/eval
- Pipeline.Run updated for dual-policy evaluation path
- eval.Config with DestructivePolicy/PrivacyPolicy (replacing single Policy)
- guard.WithDestructivePolicy/WithPrivacyPolicy options (replacing WithPolicy)
- defaultConfig() sets both policies to InteractivePolicy()
- Zero-category normalization at match construction (§4.11)
- Unit tests for all of the above including zero-category regression test

References:
- Plan: docs/plans/06-rule-categories.md §4.1-4.7, §4.11
